rows.bodyTextStart:
Skip to main content
Proofound Public Page
Direct-link proof snapshot
Copy share link
M
Mika Andersson

Evidence-led operations and service design lead

Direct link is live. Search engines are off until the owner opts in.

I help teams turn messy operational signals into calmer workflows, clearer proof, and decisions that can be explained without exposing private context.

Scale / Focus / Context

Generated from public-safe Proof Packs and context tokens

Traceable summary

SCALE

Cross-functional workflows with 8-30 reviewers and operators

Proof Pack: Operations workflow redesign

FOCUS

Turning ambiguous work evidence into calmer decisions

Proof Pack: Proof-first hiring research

CONTEXT

Privacy-aware teams that need trust without oversharing

Proof Pack: Operations workflow redesign
Request introduction

Private details stay hidden unless the owner explicitly reveals them. More export and copy options appear on wider screens.

SELECTED PROOF PACKS
Public-safe proof only
Reduced handoff ambiguity across a partner operations workflow

Operations workflow redesign

Verified evidence

VERIFICATION

Verified evidence

FRESHNESS

Unknown

SELECTED OUTCOME

Cut review back-and-forth by 38% and made the next operational decision clear in every weekly review.

TRUST SUMMARY

Evidence attested by a former manager and a cross-functional peer.

Mapped repeated service handoff failures into a concise proof trail that reviewers could inspect without seeing private customer data.

Ownership: Led discovery, synthesized evidence, and facilitated the operating rhythm with design, support, and delivery partners.

SUPPORTING EVIDENCE

Public-safe decision memo

Summarizes the choices, constraints, and measurable result without exposing internal records.

Supporting evidence only, not
